result:
Done. All work complete and verified. Plain-text summary:

Round 2 closed all five reported topics (six checks): Fresh public constants, Reserved prefixes, Left rule, Right rule, Lemma annotations, and Multiplication restriction of rules. Every trigger, message byte, and report position was derived by probing oracle/wf_oracle.sh (diff cases via --diff); no tamarin-rs source was read.

Report order was mapped with combined probes: Fresh public constants sits at #2 (after Unbound, before public-names); Reserved prefixes follows Reserved names; Left/Right rule follow lhs-not-rhs before Formula terms; Lemma annotations then Multiplication restriction sit between Formula guardedness and Nat Sorts. The three diff-only checks (Reserved prefixes, Left/Right rule) are gated on theory.is_diff, confirmed silent in non-diff mode.

The exists_trace_reuse false positive was root-caused to sort-tagged formula-variable matching (Msg vs Untagged, @i vs #i) and fixed by matching formula variables by name only; check_theory now emits just Lemma annotations, and prior formula fixtures (p05/p21/f_subterm) are unaffected.

New infra: a rule pretty-printer (pretty::pp_rule/pp_fact_list), a Wadler fillSep word-wrapper at empirically measured width 69 for the Reserved prefixes header, indent_block, and diff term/fact projection with left-first short-circuit.

Six byte-parity fixtures (tests/fixtures/r2_*.txt) were captured live from the oracle and re-verified byte-for-byte; hand-built ASTs reproduce each. cargo test is green (37 + 1). Documented gaps: long-rule wrapping, the multiplication "after-replacement"/"vars-only-in-rhs" modes, ProtoFact multi-rule joining, fresh-const list wrapping, and diff-mode Fact usage merge.

Deliverables updated: src/{pretty,checks,lib}.rs, tests/checks_tests.rs + fixtures, workspace/BEHAVIOR.md, workspace/QUERIES.log, workspace/REPORT2.md (all under /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/wellformedness/).
